name: Improve WebRTC browser throughput toward TCP

description: baseline: add autoresearch harness using aggregate webrtc/tcp throughput ratio over tcp, webrtc-direct, and webrtc

flatten each framed WebRTC message into one RTCDataChannel.send call; discard because the apparent gain came from a collapsed tcp baseline while relay throughput stayed flat/down and relay latency regressed badly

name: Improve WebRTC browser throughput toward TCP

description: switch primary metric to combined_webrtc_mbps with two short throughput samples; benchmark crashed in relayed webrtc due to stream closing during perf send
baseline: reinitialize on combined webrtc throughput metric to reduce tcp-denominator noise while keeping tcp ratio as a secondary guardrail

send each framed WebRTC record with a single RTCDataChannel.send call instead of splitting Uint8ArrayList chunks across multiple sends; improved combined throughput across webrtc-direct and relayed webrtc

name: Improve WebRTC browser throughput toward TCP
